Leslie,
Mark Zeff was at 301 East 66th Street yesterday and would like to meet with Jeffrey to discuss the following:
contract for 301 East 66th Street 
design layout for 301 East 66th Street 
design for Brillo Way 
funds for Brillo Way
He is available anytime next Tuesday - Friday.  Please let me know when Jeffrey can meet him.  Thanks.
